info.name: Nova Poshta API
info.description: Postman collection for the basic Nova Poshta API workflow: find cities and warehouses, get sender data, create a recipient, create an Internet Document/TTN, and track the shipment. The API key is stored only in the NP_API_KEY collection variable and must not be committed.

item.name: 01 - Find Sender City
item.description: Find the sender city and copy its Ref. The test script saves the first returned Ref to SENDER_CITY_REF for convenience.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }

if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0] && json.data[0].Ref) { pm.collectionVariables.set("SENDER_CITY_REF", json.data[0].Ref); console.log("Saved SENDER_CITY_REF:", json.data[0].Ref); }

item.name: 02 - Get Sender Warehouses
item.description: Get warehouses for SENDER_CITY_REF. Choose the warehouse you will ship from and put its Ref into SENDER_WAREHOUSE_REF.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }

if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0] && json.data[0].Ref) { pm.collectionVariables.set("SENDER_WAREHOUSE_REF", json.data[0].Ref); console.log("Saved SENDER_WAREHOUSE_REF:", json.data[0].Ref); }

item.name: 03 - Get Sender Counterparties
item.description: Get sender counterparties available for your API key. Copy the correct Ref to SENDER_REF.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }
if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0] && json.data[0].Ref) { pm.collectionVariables.set("SENDER_REF", json.data[0].Ref); console.log("Saved SENDER_REF:", json.data[0].Ref); }

item.name: 04 - Get Sender Contact Persons
item.description: Get sender contact persons for SENDER_REF. Copy the correct Ref to SENDER_CONTACT_REF and set SENDER_PHONE manually.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }

if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0] && json.data[0].Ref) { pm.collectionVariables.set("SENDER_CONTACT_REF", json.data[0].Ref); console.log("Saved SENDER_CONTACT_REF:", json.data[0].Ref); }

item.name: 05 - Create Recipient
item.description: Create a recipient counterparty. Use non-public personal data only in Postman local current values, not in committed collection values.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }
if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0]) {
if (json.data[0].Ref) pm.collectionVariables.set("RECIPIENT_REF", json.data[0].Ref);
const contactRef = json.data[0]?.ContactPerson?.data?.[0]?.Ref || json.data[0]?.ContactPerson?.Ref;
if (contactRef) pm.collectionVariables.set("RECIPIENT_CONTACT_REF", contactRef);

item.name: 06 - Find Recipient City
item.description: Find the recipient city and copy its Ref. The test script saves the first returned Ref to RECIPIENT_CITY_REF for convenience.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));

if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0] && json.data[0].Ref) { pm.collectionVariables.set("RECIPIENT_CITY_REF", json.data[0].Ref); console.log("Saved RECIPIENT_CITY_REF:", json.data[0].Ref); }

item.name: 07 - Get Recipient Warehouses
item.description: Get warehouses for RECIPIENT_CITY_REF. Choose the destination warehouse and put its Ref into RECIPIENT_WAREHOUSE_REF.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));

if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0] && json.data[0].Ref) { pm.collectionVariables.set("RECIPIENT_WAREHOUSE_REF", json.data[0].Ref); console.log("Saved RECIPIENT_WAREHOUSE_REF:", json.data[0].Ref); }

item.name: 08 - Get Recipient Counterparties
item.description: Optional check: list recipient counterparties saved in your account.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }

item.name: 09 - Get Recipient Contact Persons
item.description: Optional check: get contact persons for RECIPIENT_REF. Useful if you selected an existing recipient instead of creating a new one.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }

if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0] && json.data[0].Ref) { pm.collectionVariables.set("RECIPIENT_CONTACT_REF", json.data[0].Ref); console.log("Saved RECIPIENT_CONTACT_REF:", json.data[0].Ref); }

item.name: 10 - Create Internet Document
item.description: Create the Nova Poshta Internet Document/TTN. Before sending, verify all sender, recipient, city, warehouse, phone, cost, and cargo variables.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }
if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data[0]?.IntDocNumber) {
pm.collectionVariables.set("DOCUMENT_NUMBER", json.data[0].IntDocNumber);
console.log("Saved DOCUMENT_NUMBER:", json.data[0].IntDocNumber);

item.name: 11 - Track Internet Document
item.description: Track the TTN created in the previous step. Use DOCUMENT_NUMBER and RECIPIENT_PHONE or SENDER_PHONE depending on the shipment data.

exec: const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test("HTTP status is 200", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("Nova Poshta success is true", () => pm.expect(json.success, JSON.stringify(json.errors || json.warnings || [])).to.eql(true));
if (json.success === false) { console.error("Nova Poshta errors:", json.errors); }
